title: ET13373678 Part-Time Accountant (1 year contract; 3 days / week)
description:
The Company

Our client in the consulting space is currently looking for a part time accountant to join their dynamic team. You are expected to commit 3 working days / week.

The Role

In this role, responsibilities include preparing annual statutory accounts, assisting with tax return completion, and addressing outstanding audits. Monthly balance sheet reconciliations and weekly bank account reconciliations are also required. The role involves reconciling the fixed asset, accruals, and prepayments registers to the general ledger, preparing quarterly GST returns for review, and collaborating with the Accounts Receivable and Accounts Payable teams to ensure accurate accounting treatment and reconciliation of unidentified deposits and receipts.

Your Profile

You should possess at least a Degree in Accountancy / ACCA or equivalent, with minimum 5 years of relevant experience. You are expected to have strong communication skills (verbal and written) with the ability to communicate internally with team members as well as externally with clients.

Apply Today

Please send your resume, in WORD format only and quote reference number ET13373678, by clicking the apply button. Please note that only short-listed candidates will be contacted.

Robert Half International Pte Ltd. Co. Registration no.: 200612189E | EA Licence no.: 07C5595 | Tan Yee Le (Elise) EA Registration no.: R1330020

postedCompany.description:
ROBERT HALF INTERNATIONAL PTE. LTD.


Founded in 1948, Robert Half (NYSE symbol: RHI) pioneered specialised recruitment services and today - with more than 325 staffing locations worldwide - Robert Half is the world's leader in placing accounting, finance, banking and technology professionals on a temporary and permanent basis.

In Singapore, Robert Half operates four divisions:

  • Robert Half Finance and Accounting: Recruitment services for temporary and permanent finance and accounting personnel
  • Robert Half Financial Services: Recruitment services for high-calibre financial services, insurance and banking professionals
  • Robert Half Management Resources: Recruitment services for senior-level finance, accounting and business systems professionals on a project and interim basis
  • Robert Half Technology: Recruitment services for temporary and permanent IT professionals

Robert Half also is the parent company of Protiviti®, a global consulting and internal audit firm composed of experts in risk, advisory and transaction services.
